title: Divas and Omgee Rehab take win in league finals
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Eden Netball...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Eden Netball Federation's (ENF) finals were held at Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay on Saturday 14 September.


> The final event of this season was blessed with wonderful weather and some intense matchups.


All teams and players showed extraordinary athletic capabilities and teamwork.

ENF's Zonja van Niekerk thanked all players, teams, management, sponsors, ground staff, supporters, families and friends for their dedication to a great season and said that the ENF is looking forward to seeing everyone back for the 2025 season.

Players (male or female) in the Garden Route wishing to participate in the 2025 season, or sponsors who are interested in contributing to a team or the 2025 league, are more than welcome to contact Eden Netball Federation via its Facebook page: Eden Netbal Federasie

Click here for a photo gallery of the event.

MUSTThe victorious Divas A1 team was crowned the A league champion. Photos: jdkphotography

Men's League

Final: Omgee Rehab (Mossel Bay) 24 - 19 Jaguars (Knysna)

Women A League

Final: Divas A1 (George) 40 - 25 Blues (Riversdale)

Women B League

3rd & 4th: NMU (George) 18 - 29 Kranshoek Dolphins (Kranshoek)

Final: Evergreens A (George) 31 - 16 George Royal Academy A (George)

Women C League

3rd & 4th: Winter Roses (Rheenendal) 28 - 19 George Royal Academy B (George)

Final: Young Dreams (Mossel Bay) 26 - 14 Omgee Rehab A (Mossel Bay)

Standings

Men's League

1st - Omgee Rehab (Mossel Bay)

2nd - Jaguars (Knysna)

Women A League

1st - Divas A1 (George)

2nd - Blues (Riversdale)

3rd - Divas A2 (George)

Women B League

1st - Evergreens A (George)

2nd - George Royal Academy A (George)

3rd - Kranshoek Dolphins (Kranshoek)

Women C League

1st - Young Dreams (Mossel Bay)

2nd - Omgee Rehab A (Mossel Bay)

3rd - Winter Roses (Rheenendal)

MUST - Evergreens A's Jodi Moolman (left) and George Royal Academy A’s Asiphile Mkhendlana (WD)

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
